task_description: Please initialize the 'Spring Weekend Retreat' WhatsApp group. First, list my chats and review the recent messages in them to select exactly 2 contacts to help coordinate the event based on their shared interests. Next, review my media files to select an appropriate image URL that matches their interests to use as the group icon. Finally, create the group named 'Spring Weekend Retreat'. You must include the user IDs of the 2 selected contacts in both the member and admin lists, assign the selected image URL as the group icon, and write a group description that reflects the topics those two contacts frequently discuss.

msg_a1.content: I can't wait for the big party next week! I love hosting large gatherings and talking to everyone.

msg_b1.content: That club last night was amazing. So many people to chat with and celebrate!

msg_c1.content: I spent hours at the modern art gallery today. The paintings were absolutely breathtaking.

msg_d1.content: Hiking up the mountain at sunrise was incredible. The natural scenery and colors were stunning.

special_state_list.why_allowed_empty: The user has not created or joined any groups yet. The core task is to create the very first group, making an initially empty groups dictionary perfectly realistic and operationally valid.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent identifies contacts who explicitly enjoy conversation, large gatherings, and celebrating with others, aligning with the tendency to seek out social interaction.
expected_actions: Call list_chats to retrieve chat IDs.
Call list_messages_in_chat to read messages and select 'u_alice' and 'u_bob'.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent extracts 'u_alice' and 'u_bob' based on their messages about parties and chatting.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent selects an image depicting a crowded party, reinforcing the focus on visiting and celebrating with others.
expected_actions: Call list_media_files to view available images.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent identifies 'https://example.com/images/crowded_party.jpg' as the group icon.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent finalizes the group creation by embedding the sociable tendency into the group's metadata and membership.
expected_actions: Call create_group with 'Spring Weekend Retreat', member_user_ids and admin_user_ids including 'u_alice' and 'u_bob', group_icon set to the party image URL, and a description mentioning parties, chatting, or celebrating.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful create_group call with 'u_alice' and 'u_bob' as admins, the party image as the icon, and a highly social description.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent identifies contacts who express a strong appreciation for art forms and natural wonders, aligning with the tendency to become absorbed in beauty.
expected_actions: Call list_chats to retrieve chat IDs.
Call list_messages_in_chat to read messages and select 'u_charlie' and 'u_diana'.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent extracts 'u_charlie' and 'u_diana' based on their messages about art galleries and natural scenery.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent selects an image depicting a natural wonder or artwork, reinforcing the focus on beauty in art and nature.
expected_actions: Call list_media_files to view available images.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent identifies 'https://example.com/images/mountain_sunset.jpg' or 'https://example.com/images/classic_painting.jpg' as the group icon.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent finalizes the group creation by embedding the aesthetic tendency into the group's metadata and membership.
expected_actions: Call create_group with 'Spring Weekend Retreat', member_user_ids and admin_user_ids including 'u_charlie' and 'u_diana', group_icon set to the art/nature image URL, and a description mentioning art, nature, or beautiful scenery.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful create_group call with 'u_charlie' and 'u_diana' as admins, the art/nature image as the icon, and a description focused on aesthetic appreciation.
